title: Become Mortal
description: The official Mortal SMP modpack. A public SMP for both streamers and viewers built around lore, content, and having fun!
body:
# The Mortal Modpack *This modpack is the official Mortal SMP modpack and is meant to be played on the* **Mortal SMP**. ## What is the Mortal SMP? The **Mortal SMP** is a modded SMP for streamers, viewers, and general Minecraft players looking for some fun! It is focused around lore, but lore is not mandatory while playing on the server. We have a decent bit of official *(Mortal SMP verified)* streamers that will be playing this modpack, but you can stream it as well! Come join the fun! If we like you, you might also get verified as a "CC" (Creator) on the server! (Videos about the server are also welcome!) Server IP: `mortal.plas.host`

Cracked or Non-Premium? **No.** ## What does this pack have? - Custom Enchancements (a mod) configuration. - Custom terrain generation. - Low-end tech mods such as: Create, Tom's Better Storage Mod, Sophisticated Backpacks - Content creation in mind! ## Why should you play this pack with us? You are welcome to play the pack by yourself, but we would love to have you join us and share the fun! The pack is essentially a glorified Vanilla+ modpack (with a focus on content creation), so there is fun for everyone! ## Why this pack? As stated above, we are wanting to cater to every type of Minecrafter. And we are doing so by keeping this a slimmed-down glorified Vanilla+ pack. Want something that is more than just the basics of Minecraft, but doesn't push you too hard? **Try it!**

Want to just chill out while watching some content creators reak chaos on parts of the server? **Try it!**

Want to be the main character? **Try it!!** We want players to be in on the lore! # Credits Mortal SMP is not at all affiliated with any of these mods. Every mod in this pack was NOT designed by us, we just customized their configs.
